description_long: This armchair features a high, slightly reclined backrest and a wide, deep seat, both upholstered in a warm tan leather with a quilted diamond pattern. The frame and armrests are crafted from light-colored wood, smoothly curved to provide ergonomic support and a modern aesthetic. The armrests are integrated into the frame, extending seamlessly from the base to the top of the chair. The back of the chair reveals horizontal wooden support slats, adding structural integrity and a touch of visual interest. The seat and backrest appear well-padded, offering comfort for extended sitting. The overall design is contemporary, blending natural wood with luxurious leather for a stylish yet inviting appearance suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A modern armchair with a high, quilted tan leather backrest and seat, supported by a smoothly curved light wood frame and armrests. The design is both comfortable and visually striking, blending natural materials with contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, diamond-quilted leather backrest and seat, with wide, curved wooden armrests framing the chair.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chair's reclined profile, thick cushioning, and the continuous curve of the wooden frame and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the horizontal wooden support slats and the full wooden frame, with the leather upholstery wrapping over the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the ergonomic curve and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
attribute_backrest_style: high, straight, and quilted with diamond pattern
attribute_leg_type: wooden sled base integrated with frame
